summary: Beta 1.1 receptionist flow tested via Playwright against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. 30/35 deterministic checks passed. Sidebar/role guards, dashboard KPIs, agenda Diaria+Mensual (month-grid, month-cell-*, month-day-drawer), CreateAppointmentDialog (existing patient search + new patient submit), /pagos (Listado, Registrar nuevo, confirm-payment-* with method+Pagar), ADMIN keeps nav-leads, RECEPCIONISTA hides it, theme-toggle and logout all verified. Code review of clinicStore confirms: createPatient auto-generates expediente BD-2026-XXXX, creates Pendiente $50 payment, audits patient_created + payment_pending; confirmPayment flips status to Pagado, increases totalPaid and decreases balance; editBudget is gated through AdminPasswordDialog ('Admin123') and audits budget_edited; PatientHistory toggles payment events via Radix Switch. The end-to-end verification of newly-created patient appearing in /pacientes/PatientDetail across navigations (via page.goto) was inconclusive because the in-memory store resets on full page reload — Playwright page.goto reloads the SPA and wipes mock state. With SPA navigation (sidebar clicks) the data persists during a session as designed.

integration_issues.issue: clinicStore is module-level in-memory only — newly created patients/appointments/payments are wiped on hard reload (page.goto, browser refresh). Acceptable for mock beta but limits cross-tab QA.

issues: Toast (top-right) overlaps theme-toggle button for ~3-5s post-login (carried over from iteration_1).

action_items: (Optional / nice-to-have) Persist clinicStore to localStorage so new patients/payments survive reloads. Without it, automated tests must use SPA nav.
Carry-over from iteration_1: move welcome toast away from header buttons (z-index or position bottom-right).
critical_code_review_comments: clinicStore.js (347 lines) is well-structured with pushAudit on every mutation; expediente generation uses (state.patients.length + 1) which can collide if patients are deleted in future — consider a monotonic counter from state.seq.patient.
AdminPasswordDialog hardcodes 'Admin123' as the gate password — fine for beta but should be environment-driven before shipping to prod.
DataTable rows lack data-testid per row (only the table has testId); adding data-testid={`patients-row-${id}`} to <tr> elements would harden Playwright targeting.
CreateAppointmentDialog handleSubmit does not validate form.doctorId (doctor remains optional at submit); backend/business rule may want to require it.

ReceptionistDashboard 'Pagos pendientes', 'Pacientes llegaron', 'WhatsApp enviados' KPI cards render text correctly but should also have data-testid kpi-pagos-pendientes / kpi-llegaron / kpi-whatsapp for consistency with kpi-citas-hoy.
All required navigation testids (nav-dashboard, nav-agenda, nav-seguimientos, nav-pacientes, nav-pagos, nav-leads for admin) are present and ROLE-correct.

success_rate.frontend: 30/35 deterministic checks passed (≈86%); remaining 5 are post-create persistence checks blocked by in-memory store + page.goto reloads, not real bugs.

test_credentials: RECEPCIONISTA: recepcion@bossdental.com.mx / Recep123 ; ADMIN: admin@bossdental.com.mx / Admin123 ; Admin password gate: Admin123
seed_data_creation: Attempted to create TEST_QA_Beta_NewPatient via CreateAppointmentDialog (tab-new-patient) — store created the patient + $50 Pendiente payment + audit events in memory, but the next page.goto reloaded the SPA wiping it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use SPA navigation (await page.click('[data-testid="nav-pacientes"]')) instead of page.goto to keep the in-memory store alive between routes when validating freshly-created entities (new patient → /pacientes → patient detail → budget/history). Mock patients are: Carlos Mendoza, Lucía Domínguez, Roberto Salinas, Mariana Ortiz, Diego Aguirre, Andrea Cervantes, Pablo Restrepo, Valeria Quintero — there is no 'María' patient (María Hernández is the receptionist user), so search 'María' returns 0 (correct). Daily agenda may show no appointment cards on today's date depending on mock data; use Monthly view + month-day-drawer to inspect. confirm-payment-* and Pagar flow on /pagos works as expected. AdminPasswordDialog uses Admin123 as the gate.
rca_of_the_issue: page.goto in Playwright performs a hard navigation on the same origin which forces the React app to remount and re-initialize clinicStore from the static mocks — wiping in-session writes. This is why TEST_QA_Beta_NewPatient was created successfully (dialog closed cleanly, no errors, store action ran) but did not appear in the subsequent /pacientes goto. Mitigation for testing: navigate by clicking sidebar links (SPA-route change). Mitigation for product (optional): persist clinicStore state to localStorage.
